name: Oneshot E-Card
sugar_rushes: Spend over 12 hours on your project
notes: I absolutely love this project! I still haven't gotten all the easter eggs, but I'll get there soon T-T. I noticed you listed these as your Hackatime sessions: 'oneshot-e-card', 'final'; however, I can't seem to find 'final'. That won't impact the hearts awarded for this project, but let me know how to sort that out. Otherwise, an exemplary project >w<

name: Nix My Beloved
sugar_rushes: Spend over 12 hours on your project
notes: Solid project! I was hoping to see a bit more of a creative touch for these projects in general and for them to not just follow the demo, since e-cards can encompass so many different themes and functionalities, but you could always put together another submission that goes out there a bit more >w<. If you make a future submission (likely for V2 at this point), know that doing more original stuff will get you more hearts! What I thought was particularly good with this project was the small stuff, such as the mobile support, animations in the background, and the content of the card itself (it's humorous, but I like it a lot lol). Overall, great job with this project! Keep up the good work!

name: Ice Skating
notes: I really love the animations that you've incorporated into the menu and especially for opening the envelope! An envelope animation is something I really wanted to do for the demo on the site, but never got around to doing. Unfortunately, I did have to deduct 1 heart from the total for this project since your README edits show a high percentage of AI usage. You're always welcome to submit more projects for v2 if you're looking to save up for one of the bigger prizes! Let me know if you have any questions about this.
